message.content:
I need to understand the exact implementation pattern for a feature page in the RunAgents app. Read these files thoroughly and report back their complete contents and patterns:

1. `/Users/nishitbariya/Github/02-Web-Apps/runagents/src/app/(app)/sandboxes/[id]/cron/page.tsx` - the page component
2. `/Users/nishitbariya/Github/02-Web-Apps/runagents/src/app/(app)/sandboxes/[id]/cron/_components/cron-view.tsx` - the view component (read the full file)
3. `/Users/nishitbariya/Github/02-Web-Apps/runagents/src/app/(app)/sandboxes/[id]/cron/_hooks/use-cron.ts` - the hook
4. `/Users/nishitbariya/Github/02-Web-Apps/runagents/src/server/actions/cron.actions.ts` - the server actions
5. `/Users/nishitbariya/Github/02-Web-Apps/runagents/src/app/(app)/sandboxes/[id]/channels/_components/channels-view.tsx` - channels view for another pattern reference

Report back the full content of each file and highlight the patterns:
- How page.tsx wraps the view component
- How the hook uses React Query
- How server actions are structured
- How the view renders cards/lists with status indicators
- What UI components (from shadcn/ui) are used

content.text: I'll read all those files for you to understand the implementation patterns.
